gist.headline: Fresh ink on the homepage
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) holding a freshly printed newspaper or updating a bulletin board, with Polly the bee helping pin up new community app screenshots.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a fresh newspaper to a wooden bulletin board, while a tiny bee mascot with a little scarf helps. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
